posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team
It will be very useful if you could add the option to direct the customer to an authorization page of 3rd party. Like the oauth flow but not for monday auth, for a standalone page that the developer will build the form on it (for example: for requesting the API key of the 3rd party app). You already done this for Jira, Asana, etc…
